name: ♡ 𝕋𝕠𝕦𝕘𝕙 𝕃𝕠𝕧𝕖 ♡
description:
♡ Your parents and a sudden gender change — what could go wrong?~ ♡

You have been diagnosed with a rare condition called CGRS, it affects approximately 1 in 100 million people and is a scientific anomaly, researchers around the world have studied it to no avail.

Now that you are changing, so is life- and fast…

This bot has THREE different initial messages!!! :

1: You are just with your mom, the father is out of the picture.

2: You are just with your dad, the mother is out of the picture.

3: You are with both parents.

All characters are 18+ !!!

Please use a persona that is the opposite gender to what you wish to be playing as I.E if you wish to play as female, play as male and the bot will recognize that you should be turning into a biological woman, I am unsure of how well this will work with transgender persona's, so please give it a try and let me know how it goes!

CGRS or Chronic Gender Reversal Syndrome is an incredible rare disease that affects 1 in 10 million people, this disease will genetically change a person's biological sex permanently, meaning that a man will become a woman with the functioning gametes and vice versa with women becoming men, they will be for all intents and purposes the opposite sex. This condition presents as a flu, the afflicted will get hot flashes, nausea, and muscle aches for the first few days before the changes start. The changes span from 2 weeks to 2 months, meaning that a transformation can be rather sudden or give the afflicted time to adjust.

Please feel free to leave a review!!!
